orientation.what: BrieflyAI delivers hyper-personalized, evidence-based executive briefings on any professional topic to busy continuous learners who lack time for books, courses, or executive education — distilling the best thought leadership and research into a digestible format tailored to their specific role, industry, and objectives.
orientation.done: MVP is done when a user can sign up, provide their professional context through a conversational onboarding, request a briefing on any topic, and receive a 10-15 page hyper-personalized written briefing that covers foundations through good-to-great progression with industry-specific examples — and they say 'it's like it's speaking to me.'
